case_title: THE CITY CLUB OF SAN FRANCISCO VS APPLIED SIGNAL CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,888.69 FILED BY THE CITY CLUB OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT APPLIED SIGNAL CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-18-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07
INVALID SERVICE. NAMED PARTY ON POS IS NOT A PARTY NAMED IN ACTION.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY CLUB OF SAN FRANCISCO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT APPLIED SIGNAL CORPORATION DEFECT IN SERVICE WAIVED BY DEFENDANT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
